title: Visit function arguments if the function is unlinkable
skipped_reason: no SV content - PR is a Verilator internal fix for AST handling (V3LinkDot/V3Param). The test case uses valid standard SV constructs (parameterized class, static method call, queue select), but the bug is in Verilator's internal linking order, not in the SV syntax itself. No specific SV construct causes the bug; the fix enables proper handling of function arguments when the function is unlinkable before V3Param.
